$comment: c14d shipped <sys/stat.h> constants/symbols/macros (the per-target struct stat layout is witnessed by shipped_struct_stat_x86/arm64, c13). S_ mode constants + S_IS* macros + fstat (dynamic libc.so.6; the struct stat* arg coerces to the symbol's void* param). A struct stat is declared, field-written, passed to fstat, field-read; the constant VALUES + macros are the witness → exit 42 on a real Linux runtime. Two elf targets (POSIX header, availableObjectFormats:[elf], Linux WSL run target). Runs on linux-gcc + native arm64 CI legs; cross-compiles locally. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop a surface → S_IFREG/fstat/S_ISDIR undefined → compile fails.
